_purpose: The authoritative stage record for the workflow track. Tags are optional convenience; this manifest is the record build/check-stages.mjs verifies against main's actual history.

stages.description: Domain frame and axioms in waiting: what this repository's governance kernel governs and does not, twelve axioms framed, none entered.

The governance kernel generated through the real, unmodified vendored scaffolder; the shared measurement kind adopted by pinned hash; the five genuinely local software-evidence source classes documented.

Nineteen governance claims entered through the real gate; claim 19 grounded checked by a checking record citing build/check-substrate.mjs, claims 1 through 18 entered bare at their honest asserted floor with characterized gaps in the sorry ledger.

Grounding complete: all nineteen governance claims now carry real checking records and compute checked, the last ten (4, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 16, 17, 18) grounded across Phase A1, A2, and B/C's checks. Stage 4 (code-to-claim embedding) and Stage 5 (the invitation) remain.

Code-to-claim embedding: a load-bearing Governs comment naming the claim id and one binding sentence lands in every file the claim's own behavior lives in, across all 20 claims. build/check-references.mjs verifies every reference resolves and every claim is covered; docs/blast-radius.md is generated from the same parse. build/check-parameter-surface.mjs closes the spec's remaining parameter-surface deliverable.

The invitation: docs/invitation.md states what exists, what is open and whose it is, and how to arrive at each role, claiming no community into existence and counting engagement only as the graph shows it.
